description: Verticals are products and platforms managed by Chicken Hawk at the periphery of the ecosystem. They are NOT core components — they are independent services that Chicken Hawk can spawn lil_hawks to operate, monitor, and extend. New verticals can be added at any time.

verticals.name: Per|form Platform
verticals.description: Sports analytics, player stat tracking, biometric data aggregation, and predictive stat generation.

verticals.name: Blockwise AI
verticals.description: Web3 smart contract deployment, RPC management, tokenization, and on-chain transaction execution.

verticals.name: Partners Portal
verticals.description: Partner onboarding, affiliate management, and ecosystem directory.

verticals.name: Open|Klass AI
verticals.description: Multi-agent interactive classroom platform. Transforms any topic or document into rich, interactive lessons with AI teachers and classmates. Built on Next.js/React/TypeScript with LangGraph orchestration. Supports slides, quizzes, simulations, whiteboard drawing, and voice explanations.

verticals.name: Locale by ACHIEVEMOR
verticals.description: Localization and internationalization platform for ACHIEVEMOR products.

rules.addingVerticals: Any new vertical can be added at any time by appending to this registry. Chicken Hawk will auto-discover and assign lil_hawks based on the 'type' field.
rules.isolation: Each vertical operates in its own tenant space. LUC metering tracks usage per-vertical.
rules.governance: ACHEEVY routes user intents to the appropriate vertical. Picker_Ang selects the right lil_hawks for the job.
